title: The Wealthy Mindset on Time vs. Money

segments.text: Time is more valuable than money for the wealthy.
And this principle changes their spending habits.
They prioritize time-saving investments over material goods.
This creates space for more meaningful pursuits.
They believe in buying back their time intelligently.
Follow for the money mindset they never taught you.

description: Understanding time's value reshapes financial choices. Follow for the money mindset they never taught you. 💰
